summary: OpenNori exposes package-local Codex Plugin Skills for agent discovery: the marketplace points to plugins/opennori, plugin.json points to ./skills, package Skills describe natural-language routing, and doctor reports Plugin manifest, marketplace, Skills, and manifest state as healthy.
reviewability: Inspect plugin manifest, marketplace metadata, package Skills, and doctor data.plugin/checks.
limitations: This validates the source checkout package assets; external package installation should be smoke-tested after publish.
